prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科最低位次约1290→2458→1165→2955→1277名，波动较大，2025年基准约1277名；近5年位次呈"震荡"格局，2022年与2024年出现明显后移，2023年与2025年则显著前移，整体未形成单边趋势；本省理科/物理类计划2021年39人→2022年35人→2023年32人→2024年31人→2025年22人（近年持续缩减），2026年计划38人，较2025年大幅扩招约73%，扩招幅度显著，竞争压力有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科2026年主榜排名第17名（Top20），较2021年第18名、2025年第17名稳中有升，综合实力位居全国顶尖行列；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及师德师风事件（性骚扰举报等），但学校处理较为迅速；抖音热度排名第44位（较热），"文科生的最高殿堂"等标签持续传播；2024年曾出现明显负面声誉，2025年转为中性/混合；未见明显投档断档记录；拥有A+学科9个（法学、理论经济学、应用经济学、新闻传播学、社会学、统计学、工商管理、中国语言文学、马克思主义理论），A级4个，A-级2个；理科招生专业中统计学A+、计算机科学与技术A、物理学A-等学科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等理工类专业社会热度持续偏热/高热推荐；法学偏热但分化；金融/财经/经济分化观望；本省2026年考生总数约120万（较2025年增长约32%），物理类考生约73.4万，竞争加剧；中国人民大学位于北京，在京高校对河南考生吸引力较强；该校在河南招生规模较大（2026年理科38人+历史类59人合计97人），属于在京985中在豫招生较多的院校之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1277名、2026年计划大幅扩招约73%（缓解竞争）、本省考生总数增长约32%（加剧竞争）以及学校声誉偏负面等多重因素，扩招对位次的推后效应大于考生增长和声誉的收紧效应，预计2026年最低位次较2025年有所后移。预测最低位次约1900名，区间1683–2117名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest science rankings were approximately 1290 → 2458 → 1165 → 2955 → 1277, with significant fluctuations. The 2025 baseline is about 1277. In recent five years, the rankings show a "oscillating" pattern, with notable backward shifts in 2022 and 2024, and significant forward shifts in 2023 and 2025, without forming a single trend. The provincial science/physics enrollment plan: 39 in 2021 → 35 in 2022 → 32 in 2023 → 31 in 2024 → 22 in 2025 (continuously shrinking in recent years). The 2026 plan is 38, a substantial expansion of about 73% compared to 2025, significantly easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked 17th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking (Top 20), steadily rising from 18th in 2021 and 17th in 2025, with comprehensive strength among the top tier nationally. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving teacher ethics incidents (sexual harassment reports, etc.), but the school handled them relatively quickly. Douyin popularity ranks 44th (relatively hot), with labels like "the highest temple for liberal arts students" continuously spreading. In 2024, there was a clearly negative reputation, turning neutral/mixed in 2025. No obvious enrollment gaps recorded. It has 9 A+ disciplines (Law, Theoretical Economics, Applied Economics, Journalism and Communication, Sociology, Statistics, Business Administration, Chinese Language and Literature, Marxist Theory), 4 A-level, and 2 A- level. Among science enrollment majors, Statistics (A+), Computer Science and Technology (A), Physics (A-) have outstanding disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other science/engineering majors have sustained high/very high social popularity; Law is popular but diverging; Finance/Finance/Economics are diverging and wait-and-see. In 2026, the province's total number of examinees is about 1.2 million (an increase of about 32% compared to 2025), with about 734,000 physics examinees, intensifying competition. Renmin University of China is located in Beijing, and universities in Beijing have strong appeal to Henan examinees. The university has a relatively large enrollment scale in Henan (38 science + 59 history = 97 total in 2026), making it one of the universities in Beijing with a higher enrollment in Henan among 985 universities.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 1277, the significant enrollment expansion of about 73% in 2026 (easing competition), the increase of about 32% in the total number of provincial examinees (intensifying competition), and the somewhat negative school reputation, the expansion's effect of pushing back the ranking is greater than the tightening effects of examinee growth and reputation. It is expected that the lowest ranking in 2026 will be pushed back compared to 2025. The predicted lowest ranking is about 1900, with a range of 1683–2117.

- Computer Class (Turing Computer Top Class)
- Statistics Class (Digital Intelligence Scientist Program)
- Law.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Finance Class
- Computer Class (AI Full-Stack Engineer Program)
- Science Experimental Class (Finance and Mathematics Innovation Talent Class)
- Science Experimental Class (National Economy and Digital Science Innovation Talent Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Physics / Yan Jici Physics Top Class)
- Science Experimental Class (Chinese Academy of Sciences Joint Training Chemistry Elite Direction)
- Mathematics Class (Intelligent Mathematics and Data Computing Excellence Program)
- Public Management Class (Digital Intelligence Governance Pilot Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range (1683–2117), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 flagship majors as a stretch and Tier 3 majors as safety. For rankings significantly better than the lower bound (e.g., within 1600), focus on attacking Tier 1 flagship majors such as Law, Artificial Intelligence, and Statistics. For rankings near the upper bound (e.g., around 2100), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors, while also considering relatively stable popular majors in Tier 2.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 121 → 245 → 162 → 170 → 155, fluctuating within the 120–245 range; in 2022, due to changes in exam difficulty, there was a significant backward shift (245th), while the last three years (2023–2025) stabilized between 155–170, with a baseline of about 155 in 2025; the provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 40 in 2021 → 32 in 2022 → 27 in 2023 → 28 in 2024 → 42 in 2025, and the 2026 plan is 59, a substantial expansion of about 40% compared to 2025, significantly easing competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked 17th (Top 20) in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, firmly among the top comprehensive universities in China; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving teacher ethics incidents, but the school handled them relatively quickly; Douyin popularity ranks 44th (relatively hot), with the label 'the highest hall for liberal arts students' deeply rooted; in 2024, there was a notably negative reputation (professor sexual harassment incident), turning neutral/mixed in 2025; no obvious enrollment gaps recorded; has 9 A+ disciplines, including Law A+, Applied Economics A+, Journalism and Communication A+, Sociology A+, Statistics A+, Business Administration A+, Theoretical Economics A+, Chinese Language and Literature A+, and Marxist Theory A+, all core liberal arts disciplines, with top-tier academic strength nationwide.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is relatively hot and recommended; Finance/Finance and Economics/Economics are divided and wait-and-see; Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged; Chinese Language/Literature is relatively hot and recommended; the total number of examinees in the province in 2026 is about 1.2 million (an increase of about 32% from 2025), with about 466,000 history category examinees, intensifying competition; Renmin University of China is located in Beijing, and as the highest institution for humanities and social sciences, it has a strong appeal to high-scoring liberal arts examinees in Henan; the university has a relatively large enrollment scale for liberal arts in Henan (59 in 2026), making it one of the universities in Beijing with the largest liberal arts enrollment in Henan.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 155, the significant enrollment expansion of about 40% in 2026 (easing competition), the increase in total provincial examinees by about 32% (intensifying competition), and the somewhat negative school reputation, the backward-pushing effect of enrollment expansion on rankings is greater than the tightening effect of examinee growth. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly shift backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 200, with a range of 177–223.
